visi_misi.title: Vision & Mission
visi_misi.visi_content: To be a pioneering school in sustainable education that produces an environmentally conscious generation with strong character, ready to face future challenges.
misi_items: Integrate environmental education into all subjects
Implement eco-friendly practices in all school activities
Develop critical and creative thinking skills through environmental projects
Build partnerships with communities for broader environmental impact
Foster green entrepreneurship spirit in every student
